description: Trendy and functional, these Edge-summers sandals from skechers are perfect for urban wear. With a great mesh-synthetic leather combination, these sandals are designed for casual wear. Look super stylish in these comfortable pair all day long. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays in a criss-cross pattern covering the forefoot and midfoot for durability and style Mesh inserts for greater ventillation stitch detailing for added style Ankle strap with Velcro closures on the side for a snug Fit Midsole Fabric covered cushioned insole for all day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with textured pattern for greater grip Flex grooves for better flexibility of the feet shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
